_comment: Codex arrangement (targets current Codex: Agent Skills on the open agentskills.io standard). Custom prompts are DEPRECATED, so the generator emits one Agent Skill per role under skills/<id>/SKILL.md (installed to .agents/skills/), bundling each role's shared/ templates + scripts/. These are the SAME packages as Claude/Kiro — build.py shares one emit_skill across all three. Authored (not generated): AGENTS.md, the lean gated-chain orchestrator that points at the skills. MCP sources (e.g. SharePoint) are configured by the user in config.toml [mcp_servers] — documented in AGENTS.md, not shipped (config.toml is user-owned and would clobber).
